productDisplayName: Lakme Absolute White Intense Beige Honey Wet & Dry Compact 05
description: SHADE NAMEBeige HoneyWHAT IT IS?The Lakme Absolute White Intense Wet and Dry Compact is an intense dual compact that makes your skin look naturally fair and flawless.WHAT IT DOES?Contains a unique formula of Hyaluronic acid hydrates which restores the natural glowVitamin B3 acts as the fairness agent, nourishes the beauty of your skin and brings out your flawlessnessSPF17 protects you from the UV raysINGREDIENTSZinc Oxide, Nylon Powder, DimethiconeFEATURESSmooth and satin matte texture that gives you an even-toned skin.Rich in vitamin B3 and Hyaluronic acid.Available in 6 shades.3-in-1 Skin Care regimeABOUT THE COLLECTIONThe Lakme Absolute White Intense Wet and Dry Compact will add a wonderful healthy glow to your face. The Lakme Absolute White Intense Wet and Dry Compact is an intense dual compact that makes your skin look naturally fair and flawless.ABOUT THE BRANDLakme is India's No.1 color cosmetics brand offering a wide range of high-end, world-class color cosmetics and skincare products. Lakme has a vast product range specially crafted by experts for the Indian skin. The brand has also been redefining fashion in India with Lakme Fashion Week, India's premier fashion event.
